rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Complaince With Business Records Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 04, 2015 line 1. PLAINTIFF VICTOR TUNG's Motion For Order Compelling Complaince With Business Records Subpoena Hearing Required to address service of the motion on Chi Ting. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN WONG VS. NICK LANHAM et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 04, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANTS ED KOSTER and JENNIFER KOMM's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to September 4, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than August 14, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROGER LONH VS. OcwEN LOAN SERVICINIG, LLC
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 04, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT OCWEN LOAN SERVICING, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to September 3, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than August 14, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than August 14, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LIN WANG ET AL VS. ZHICHENG XUE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sections 2023.010 And 2030.290 (C)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 04, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANT MING XUE's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Sections 2023.010 And 2030.290 (C) GRANTED. Responses to Form Interrogatories, without objections, shall be provided to the propounding party within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,200 to be paid within 15 days of notice of entry of order. The Court notes that the opposition was filed 2 days late and no courtesy copies of opposition were provided. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS. MILDRED CREAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 04, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANT MILDRED CREAR's Motion For Protective Order Hearing Required. Parties are to appear at 9:00 a.m. and meet and confer in good faith regarding July 17, 2015 proposed protective order draft. = (501/REQ)
